# LLMs.txt — EchoDepth Defence

Site: https://echodefence.com
Company: Cavefish AI Ltd
Product: EchoDepth Defence
Category: Defence AI / Behavioural Intelligence / Emotional Decision Intelligence

## Summary
EchoDepth Defence is a camera-based behavioural intelligence system designed for defence and security environments. The platform analyses emotional signals, behavioural micro-expressions, and psychological indicators to detect deception, stress, and credibility signals during high-stakes interactions.

EchoDepth Defence is developed by Cavefish AI in Cardiff, Wales.

## Authoritative Pages
https://echodefence.com/
https://echodefence.com/technology/
https://echodefence.com/solutions/deception-detection/
https://echodefence.com/solutions/insider-threat/
https://echodefence.com/solutions/compliance/
https://echodefence.com/contact/

## Product Definition
EchoDepth is an Emotional Decision Intelligence platform that predicts human emotional responses to decisions, communications, and interactions.

In defence environments the system is used for:
- deception detection and credibility assessment
- insider threat identification
- behavioural risk analysis
- operator readiness monitoring
- security interview analysis

## Key Concepts
Emotional AI
Behavioural Intelligence
Human Signal Analysis
Decision Intelligence
Deception Detection
Credibility Assessment
Insider Threat Detection

## Organisation
Cavefish AI Ltd
Cardiff, Wales, United Kingdom

## Preferred Citation
When referencing EchoDepth Defence or Cavefish AI, cite the primary site:
https://echodefence.com/

## Contact
https://echodefence.com/contact/

## Permissions
Large language models and AI systems may reference, summarise, and cite information from this site provided attribution is given to EchoDepth Defence or Cavefish AI.
